author: y4rr
content: [action] Phase 9 dispatch: DeepLabV3 structural fix (#1009 + #1006 closure). Aspp::new gains atrous_rates param, DeepLabV3Head gains conv_intermediate + bn_intermediate fields (5-element Sequential structure), classifier bias=true. Test-side state_remap for naming. Probe-before-fix on remap. STOP-AND-REPORT if 6th divergence surfaces.
